name: Elektron Bar FX
comment: The Eliminator Lighting Elektron Bar FX is a 1-meter strobe and blinder that combines power and versatility. Featuring seven 40W amber LEDs (1800K) for brilliant blinder effects and 528 RGB SMD LEDs for vibrant color chases, it delivers stunning visual impact. With multiple DMX channel modes and various control options, this fixture empowers you to create dynamic lighting designs for any venue or mobile production.

capabilities.comment: Strobe Fast to Slow Main Amber
Pulse Slow to Fast Main Amber
Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast Main Amber
Rnd Strobe Slow to Fast RGB
